fields.description: REST API username supplied by Cashflows support. NOT the HOST CONNECTION credentials shown on the terminal's API Credentials screen.
fields.label: API Username

fields.description: REST API passcode supplied by Cashflows support.
fields.label: API Passcode

fields.description: REST API port on the terminal. Default 8080.
fields.label: Default Port

fields.description: How often the till polls the terminal for transaction status, in milliseconds.
fields.label: Poll Interval (ms)

fields.description: Maximum time to wait for a payment to complete before giving up (seconds). Cashflows default is 150s.
fields.label: Payment Timeout (s)

fields.description: TCP connect timeout for HTTP calls to the terminal (seconds).
fields.label: Connect Timeout (s)

fields.description: Read timeout for HTTP calls to the terminal (seconds).
fields.label: Read Timeout (s)
